required_params.name: funnel_steps
required_params.description: List of event names representing steps in the funnel, in order

optional_params.name: step_names
optional_params.description: Friendly names for the funnel steps (if None, funnel_steps will be used) (optional)

optional_params.name: max_step_time
optional_params.description: Maximum time (in seconds) allowed between steps (if None, no time limit) (optional)

outputs.description: Function that analyzes a funnel in a CohortPipe.

analyze_funnel.description:
Analyze a user funnel using the existing CohortPipe framework

Parameters:
-----------
event_column : str
    Column containing event names/types
user_id_column : str
    Column containing user identifiers
funnel_steps : List[str]
    List of event names representing steps in the funnel, in order
step_names : List[str], optional
    Friendly names for the funnel steps (if None, funnel_steps will be used)
max_step_time : int, optional
    Maximum time (in seconds) allowed between steps (if None, no time limit)

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that analyzes a funnel in a CohortPipe

required_params.name: date_column
required_params.description: Column containing dates for cohort formation

required_params.name: funnel_steps
required_params.description: List of event names representing steps in the funnel, in order

optional_params.name: step_names
optional_params.description: Friendly names for the funnel steps (if None, funnel_steps will be used) (optional)

optional_params.name: max_periods
optional_params.description: Maximum number of periods to include (default: 12)

optional_params.name: datetime_format
optional_params.description: Format string for parsing dates if they are not already datetime objects (optional)

outputs.description: Function that analyzes funnel by time periods in a CohortPipe.

analyze_funnel_by_time.description:
Analyze funnel performance over time using the existing CohortPipe framework

Parameters:
-----------
event_column : str
    Column containing event names/types
user_id_column : str
    Column containing user identifiers
date_column : str
    Column containing dates for cohort formation
funnel_steps : List[str]
    List of event names representing steps in the funnel, in order
step_names : List[str], optional
    Friendly names for the funnel steps (if None, funnel_steps will be used)
time_period : str, default='M'
    Time period for cohort grouping ('D', 'W', 'M', 'Q', 'Y')
max_periods : int, default=12
    Maximum number of periods to include
datetime_format : str, optional
    Format string for parsing dates if they are not already datetime objects

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that analyzes funnel by time periods in a CohortPipe

required_params.name: segment_column
required_params.description: Column containing segment information to group by

required_params.name: funnel_steps
required_params.description: List of event names representing steps in the funnel, in order

optional_params.name: step_names
optional_params.description: Friendly names for the funnel steps (if None, funnel_steps will be used) (optional)

optional_params.name: min_users
optional_params.description: Minimum number of users required for a segment to be included (default: 10)

outputs.description: Function that analyzes funnel by segments in a CohortPipe.

analyze_funnel_by_segment.description:
Analyze funnel performance across different user segments using the existing CohortPipe framework

Parameters:
-----------
event_column : str
    Column containing event names/types
user_id_column : str
    Column containing user identifiers
segment_column : str
    Column containing segment information to group by
funnel_steps : List[str]
    List of event names representing steps in the funnel, in order
step_names : List[str], optional
    Friendly names for the funnel steps (if None, funnel_steps will be used)
min_users : int, default=10
    Minimum number of users required for a segment to be included

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that analyzes funnel by segments in a CohortPipe

required_params.name: funnel_steps
required_params.description: List of event names representing steps in the funnel, in order

optional_params.name: step_names
optional_params.description: Friendly names for the funnel steps (if None, funnel_steps will be used) (optional)

optional_params.name: max_path_length
optional_params.description: Maximum number of steps to include in a path (default: 10)

optional_params.name: min_path_frequency
optional_params.description: Minimum number of users who must take a path for it to be included (default: 5)

outputs.description: Function that analyzes user paths through the funnel.

analyze_user_paths.description:
Analyze actual paths users take through the funnel (not just the ideal path)

Parameters:
-----------
event_column : str
    Column containing event names/types
user_id_column : str
    Column containing user identifiers
timestamp_column : str
    Column containing event timestamps
funnel_steps : List[str]
    List of event names representing steps in the funnel, in order
step_names : List[str], optional
    Friendly names for the funnel steps (if None, funnel_steps will be used)
max_path_length : int, default=10
    Maximum number of steps to include in a path
min_path_frequency : int, default=5
    Minimum number of users who must take a path for it to be included

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that analyzes actual user paths in a CohortPipe

outputs.description: Function that returns funnel analysis summary.

get_funnel_summary.description:
Return a summary of funnel analysis results

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that returns funnel summary from a CohortPipe

required_params.name: metric_column
required_params.description: Column containing the metric to compare (e.g., 'Purchase_rate')

optional_params.name: baseline_segment
optional_params.description: Segment to use as the baseline for comparison (if None, use average) (optional)

outputs.description: Function that compares funnel metrics across segments.

compare_segments.description:
Compare funnel metrics across segments

Parameters:
-----------
metric_column : str
    Column containing the metric to compare (e.g., 'Purchase_rate')
baseline_segment : str, optional
    Segment to use as the baseline for comparison (if None, use average)

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that compares segments in a CohortPipe
